title: HOOK 2 — SAFETY/SHARING beat
prompt: Medium shot in @dream-house. @Sara on the LEFT stands wide-eyed in front of the wrapped Dream House. @Eva on the RIGHT bounces excitedly on her toes. @Mama kneels just behind them in the center, one gentle hand on Sara's shoulder. Mama (warm, calm): "This is your special birthday gift, Sara — but the most magical houses are the ones we play in together. Will you share with your sister?" Sara (smiling big): "Of course, Mama!" Eva (eyes huge): "REALLY-REALLY-REALLY?!" Bright morning light.
